plugins.name: api-reverse-engineer
plugins.description: Capture browser network requests through Chrome DevTools Protocol when a web UI is the only reliable API reference.

plugins.name: azure-doctor
plugins.description: Diagnose and fix Azure deployments across repos, CI/CD pipelines, subscriptions, and service health.

plugins.name: clean
plugins.description: Perform post-merge git cleanup by returning to main/master, pulling latest, deleting merged branches, pruning remotes, and verifying a clean state.

plugins.name: doc-generator
plugins.description: Generate professional PDF and Word (DOCX) documents from markdown source files.

plugins.name: edge-browser
plugins.description: Launch Microsoft Edge with a specific user profile and remote debugging enabled for CDP control.

plugins.name: git-code-review
plugins.description: Run a structured closeout review over local, branch, commit, or PR diffs before shipping.

plugins.name: git-commit
plugins.description: Create conventional commits with diff analysis, safe staging, and repository guideline awareness.

plugins.name: git-safety-scan
plugins.description: Scan staged changes or commits for sensitive data before pushing to remote.

plugins.name: github-writer
plugins.description: Write PRs, issues, and comments for GitHub with encoding-safe body files and sanitized, structured content.

plugins.name: pr-review-address
plugins.description: Review, address, and resolve GitHub PR feedback across comments, review threads, and requested changes.
